seo.title: Bovada Withdrawal Guide 2026 | Fees, Limits & Times
seo.description: Complete Bovada withdrawal breakdown — Bitcoin, Litecoin, Ethereum, USDT, BSV, BCH. Per-transaction limits, weekly caps, processing times, and KYC requirements for 2026.

tax_reporting.notes: Bovada does not issue W-2G or 1099 forms. US taxpayers are legally required to self-report all gambling winnings on Schedule 1 / Form 1040.

withdrawal_methods.processing_display: BTC: up to 24 hours | LTC/BSV: ~1 hour
withdrawal_methods.pro_tip: Litecoin has the highest weekly cap ($180K) and settles in under a minute. For large cashouts, LTC is strictly superior to BTC. Always withdraw to a non-custodial wallet (Exodus, Trust Wallet) before transferring to Coinbase — direct gambling deposits trigger account bans.
ETH, USDT, and BCH have a hard $2,500 weekly cap — significantly lower than BTC/LTC. Only use these for small payouts. If you need more than $2,500/week, switch to Bitcoin or Litecoin.
Bovada allows one free non-crypto withdrawal every 90 days. Expect a 5-10 day hold when depositing this check at a US bank due to foreign origins.

verification.kyc_trigger: First withdrawal request, or if using a new credit card
verification.pro_tip: Submit your documents the day you open your account. Do not wait until you request a payout.

common_delays: Attempting to withdraw before completing bonus rollover
withdrawal_experience.rollover_rules: All cash deposits have a mandatory 1x rollover before withdrawal to prevent money laundering.
withdrawal_experience.cancellation_window: Can be reversed while 'Pending' (typically a 12-24 hour window).

faqs.question: How long does a Bovada Bitcoin withdrawal take?
faqs.answer: Bovada states Bitcoin withdrawals take up to 24 hours, but most users receive their funds in 1 to 2 hours after the request is approved. Litecoin and Ethereum withdrawals typically arrive within 1 hour.

faqs.question: What are Bovada's weekly crypto withdrawal limits?
faqs.answer: Litecoin has the highest weekly limit at $180,000. Bitcoin allows up to $90,000/week. Ethereum, USDT, and Bitcoin Cash are capped at $2,500/week — making them unsuitable for large cashouts.

faqs.question: Does Bovada charge withdrawal fees?
faqs.answer: Cryptocurrency withdrawals are completely free from Bovada's side — you only pay blockchain network gas fees. Check by Courier costs $100, though Bovada waives the fee for one non-crypto withdrawal every 90 days.

faqs.question: Why was my Bovada withdrawal denied?
faqs.answer: The most common reasons are: unverified identity (KYC not complete), attempting to withdraw active bonus funds before meeting rollover requirements, entering an invalid crypto address, or hitting the one-withdrawal-every-3-days limit.
